{{Quote|We're all dying. Promise yourselves you'll be the last to go!|Clone Commander Salvo to his troops|<ref name="Sith" />}}
The '''32nd Air Combat Wing''' was an aerial assault division of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] led by [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo]] and based on the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Gallant (Victory I-class)|''Gallant'']]. They fought at the [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|Battle of Murkhana]] and the [[Battle of Paarin Minor]], among others.
{{Military-stub}}
